hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && git -C "/Users/maheshdalvi/Documents/Trivia App" add "$FILE" && (git -C "/Users/maheshdalvi/Documents/Trivia App" diff --cached --quiet || git -C "/Users/maheshdalvi/Documents/Trivia App" commit -m "Auto-commit: $(basename \"$FILE\")") 2>/dev/null || true
